001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.control;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.BloodGlucoseReadingSource;
010import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.BloodGlucoseReadingType;
011import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion;
012import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.BolusPermissionResponse;
013import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.RemoteBgEntryResponse;
014import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.TimeSinceResetResponse;
015
016/**
017 * Adds the BG entered in the bolus window to the pump as a BG entry.
018 *
019 * pumpTime is the ACTUAL pump time seconds since boot, and can be returned from a TimeSinceResetResponse
020 * via {@link TimeSinceResetResponse#getPumpTimeSecondsSinceReset()}
021 */
022/**
023 * Adds the BG entered in the bolus window to the pump as a BG entry.
024 *
025 * pumpTime is the ACTUAL pump time seconds since boot, and can be returned from a TimeSinceResetResponse
026 * via {@link TimeSinceResetResponse#getPumpTimeSecondsSinceReset()}
027 *
028
029 *
030 * <br>
031 *
032 * Request message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.RemoteBgEntryResponse}, opCode -74, size 11
033 *
034 * <br>
035 *
036 * 
037 * <table border='1'>
038 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
039 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-74</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
040 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>11</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
041 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#REQUEST}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
042 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CONTROL}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
043 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>response</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.RemoteBgEntryResponse}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
044 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>signed</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>true</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
045 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>minApi</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion#API_V2_5}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
046 * </table>
047 */@MessageProps(
048    opCode=-74,
049    size=11, // 35 with 24 byte padding
050    type=MessageType.REQUEST,
051    characteristic=Characteristic.CONTROL,
052    response=RemoteBgEntryResponse.class,
053    signed=true,
054    minApi=KnownApiVersion.API_V2_5
055)
056public class RemoteBgEntryRequest extends Message {
057    private int bg;
058    private boolean useForCgmCalibration;
059    private BloodGlucoseReadingType entryType;
060    private BloodGlucoseReadingSource source;
061    private long pumpTime;
062    private int bolusId;
063
064    public RemoteBgEntryRequest() {}
065
066    /**
067     * Creates a request to add a data point of the current BG to the provided bolus ID (which must
068     * be in progress; in a state between calling {@link BolusPermissionRequest} and {@link InitiateBolusRequest})
069     * @param bg the blood glucose value in mg/dL
070     * @param useForCgmCalibration if the BG should be used to calibrate the active G6 or G7 CGM sensor
071     * @param entryType the type of BG reading (MANUAL or AUTO from CGM)
072     * @param source the source of the BG reading (PUMP or REMOTE via BLE)
073     * @param pumpTimeSecondsSinceBoot the output of {@link TimeSinceResetResponse#getPumpTimeSecondsSinceReset()}
074     * @param bolusId the bolus ID returned from {@link BolusPermissionResponse#getBolusId()}
075     */
076    public RemoteBgEntryRequest(int bg, boolean useForCgmCalibration, BloodGlucoseReadingType entryType, BloodGlucoseReadingSource source, long pumpTimeSecondsSinceBoot, int bolusId) {
077        this.cargo = buildCargo(bg, useForCgmCalibration, entryType, source, pumpTimeSecondsSinceBoot, bolusId);
078        this.bg = bg;
079        this.useForCgmCalibration = useForCgmCalibration;
080        this.entryType = entryType;
081        this.source = source;
082        this.pumpTime = pumpTimeSecondsSinceBoot;
083        this.bolusId = bolusId;
084    }
085
086    /**
087     * @deprecated Use {@link #RemoteBgEntryRequest(int, boolean, BloodGlucoseReadingType, BloodGlucoseReadingSource, long, int)} instead.
088     * This constructor hardcodes entryType to MANUAL and maps isAutopopBg to source (true=REMOTE, false=PUMP).
089     */
090    @Deprecated
091    public RemoteBgEntryRequest(int bg, boolean useForCgmCalibration, boolean isAutopopBg, long pumpTimeSecondsSinceBoot, int bolusId) {
092        this(bg, useForCgmCalibration,
093             BloodGlucoseReadingType.MANUAL,
094             isAutopopBg ? BloodGlucoseReadingSource.REMOTE : BloodGlucoseReadingSource.PUMP,
095             pumpTimeSecondsSinceBoot, bolusId);
096    }
097
098    /**
099     * <table border="1">
100     * <caption>Parsed fields for RemoteBgEntryRequest:</caption>
101     * <tr><td><code>bg</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 0)</code></td></tr>
102     * <tr><td><code>useForCgmCalibration</code></td><td><code>(raw[2] == 1)</code></td></tr>
103     * <tr><td><code>entryType</code></td><td><code>BloodGlucoseReadingType.fromId(raw[3])</code></td></tr>
104     * <tr><td><code>source</code></td><td><code>BloodGlucoseReadingSource.fromId(raw[4])</code></td></tr>
105     * <tr><td><code>pumpTime</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 5)</code></td></tr>
106     * <tr><td><code>bolusId</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 9)</code></td></tr>
107     * </table>
108     */
109    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
110        raw = removeSignedRequestHmacBytes(raw);
111        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
112        this.cargo = raw;
113        this.bg = Bytes.readShort(raw, 0);
114        this.useForCgmCalibration = (raw[2] == 1);
115        this.entryType = BloodGlucoseReadingType.fromId(raw[3]);
116        this.source = BloodGlucoseReadingSource.fromId(raw[4]);
117        this.pumpTime = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 5);
118        this.bolusId = Bytes.readShort(raw, 9);
119    }
120
121
122    /**
123     * <table border="1">
124     * <caption>Byte layout for RemoteBgEntryRequest.buildCargo(...):</caption>
125     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
126     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bg) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
127     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bg) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
128     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>(byte) (useForCgmCalibration ? 1 : 0)</code></td></tr>
129     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>(byte) entryType.id()</code></td></tr>
130     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>(byte) source.id()</code></td></tr>
131     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>toUint32(pumpTime) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
132     * <tr><td>6</td><td><code>toUint32(pumpTime) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
133     * <tr><td>7</td><td><code>toUint32(pumpTime) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
134     * <tr><td>8</td><td><code>toUint32(pumpTime) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
135     * <tr><td>9</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bolusId) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
136     * <tr><td>10</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bolusId) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
137     * </table>
138     */
139    public static byte[] buildCargo(int bg, boolean useForCgmCalibration, BloodGlucoseReadingType entryType, BloodGlucoseReadingSource source, long pumpTime, int bolusId) {
140        return Bytes.combine(
141            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bg),
142            new byte[]{(byte) (useForCgmCalibration ? 1 : 0)},
143            new byte[]{(byte) entryType.id()},
144            new byte[]{(byte) source.id()},
145            Bytes.toUint32(pumpTime),
146            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bolusId)
147        );
148    }
149
150    /**
151     * @deprecated Use {@link #buildCargo(int, boolean, BloodGlucoseReadingType, BloodGlucoseReadingSource, long, int)} instead.
152     */
153    @Deprecated
154    public static byte[] buildCargo(int bg, boolean useForCgmCalibration, boolean isAutopopBg, long pumpTime, int bolusId) {
155        return buildCargo(bg, useForCgmCalibration,
156            BloodGlucoseReadingType.MANUAL,
157            isAutopopBg ? BloodGlucoseReadingSource.REMOTE : BloodGlucoseReadingSource.PUMP,
158            pumpTime, bolusId);
159    }
160
161    public int getBG() {
162        return bg;
163    }
164
165    public BloodGlucoseReadingType getEntryType() {
166        return entryType;
167    }
168
169    public BloodGlucoseReadingSource getSource() {
170        return source;
171    }
172
173    /**
174     * @deprecated Use {@link #getSource()} instead. Returns true if source is REMOTE.
175     */
176    @Deprecated
177    public boolean getIsAutopopBg() {
178        return source == BloodGlucoseReadingSource.REMOTE;
179    }
180
181    /**
182     * @deprecated Use {@link #getSource()} instead. Returns true if source is REMOTE.
183     */
184    @Deprecated
185    public boolean isAutopopBg() {
186        return source == BloodGlucoseReadingSource.REMOTE;
187    }
188
189    public boolean isUseForCgmCalibration() {
190        return useForCgmCalibration;
191    }
192
193    public boolean getUseForCgmCalibration() {
194        return useForCgmCalibration;
195    }
196
197    public long getPumpTime() {
198        return pumpTime;
199    }
200
201    public int getBolusId() {
202        return bolusId;
203    }
204
205
206}
